title: Marie of the Isles
writer: Georges Combret, Robert Gaillard, Robert Gaillard
actors: Belinda Lee, Alain Saury, Darío Moreno
plot: In 1635, Jacques du Parquet, the nephew of the well known explorer Belain d'Esnambic, enters a tavern in Dieppe, and falls in love with the daughter of the bartender, Marie Bonnard. He knows his noble family would disaprove such a...
